special_mechanics.name: Vertical Scrolling Flight
special_mechanics.description: Player controls the Raptor jet in a vertically scrolling shooter environment with continuous upward screen movement

special_mechanics.name: Shield System
special_mechanics.description: Regular shielding (100 points) regenerates slowly when not firing; Phase shields (100 points each, max 5 layers purchasable) do not regenerate unless pickups collected

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Systems
special_mechanics.description: Two weapon categories: always-active weapons fire simultaneously, selectable weapons can be switched dynamically. Includes auto-tracking turrets, cannons with instant beams, and megabombs (max 5)

tier_notes: Tier 3 extraction: This is a vertical scrolling shoot-em-up where the player controls a jet aircraft. The Wikipedia source contains no quantitative physics parameters such as movement speeds, acceleration, gravity, or jump mechanics. Such parameters are not applicable to the shmup paradigm which focuses on flight mechanics and weapon systems rather than traditional platformer movement physics.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Raptor: Call of the Shadows
